persistence.warning: Changes could not be saved permanently.
teacher.title: Teacher View
teacher.empty: Load student progress reports to view their practice data.
dashboard.session_help: Start the recommended session or adjust instrument and duration first.
dashboard.materials_desc: Assignments and imported pieces stay separate so your daily next step stays clear.
session.review_choice: Choose whether to repeat this exercise or continue with the next one.
session.guidance_waiting: Start with the target note. As soon as the app recognizes it, the hold phase begins.
session.guidance_detecting: Stay on the note until the hold indicator starts cleanly.
session.guidance_held: Keep holding the note until the bar is full.
tonelab.idle_prompt: Start live listening to see pitch, cents, and stability.
tonelab.live_hint_inactive: 1. Start live listening first. After that you can see your signal on the left and practice a mode on the right.
tonelab.live_hint_free: Tone Lab is listening live. Play freely and watch pitch, cents, and history on the left.
tonelab.live_hint_drone: Tone Lab is listening live. Choose a drone note on the right and play along with it.
tonelab.live_hint_training: 1. Live listening is already running. 2. Start the actual training for this mode on the right.
tonelab.mode_goal.free_play: Goal: explore stable, relaxed notes in your comfortable middle register and watch how the sound settles.
tonelab.mode_goal.drone: Goal: match the drone first, then center the pitch calmly before moving away from it.
tonelab.mode_goal.target: Goal: land on one target note clearly and hold it without rushing.
tonelab.mode_goal.interval: Goal: hear the root, imagine the distance internally, then play above it on purpose.
tonelab.mode_goal.ear: Goal: listen first, answer second. Work from inner hearing instead of guessing.
tonelab.drone.hint: Start with unison or octave and line your pitch up cleanly with the drone first.
tonelab.interval.desc: Hear the root, sing or imagine the distance internally, then play the interval above it.
tonelab.target.desc: One note appears. Play it in your comfortable middle register and hold it steady for 2 seconds.
ear.interval_id_desc: Listen to two notes and name the distance. Start with clear, simple intervals.
ear.melodic_desc: Listen to a short melody, then play it back calmly instead of guessing.
ear.pitch_memory_desc: Hear one note, wait briefly, then recall it from inner hearing.
progress.next_focus_first: Start with a first session. After that, ToneTrainer can give you a more targeted next focus.
progress.next_focus_weak: Focus next on {note}. Your recent history shows the largest average deviation there.
progress.next_focus_basics: Recent accuracy has been on the lower side. A calm long-tone or fundamentals session is the best next step.
progress.next_focus_streak: You have practised for {days} days in a row. Keep the streak with a short, clean session instead of forcing more difficulty.
progress.next_focus_continue: You are on track. Start the next session and watch whether accuracy and steadiness keep improving.
progress.weak_spots_empty: Play some sessions to see tendencies.
progress.diary_empty: No sessions yet. Start your first session!
settings.microphone_permission_denied: Microphone access was denied. Check macOS Privacy & Security settings and try again.
settings.microphone_usage_hint: The selected microphone will be used the next time you start a session or live practice mode.
settings.microphone_usage_hint_running: If audio is already running, the selected microphone is applied immediately by restarting the input capture.
settings.debug_unavailable: Audio debug is not available right now.
settings.export_desc: Download your practice history as JSON
share.title: Share Progress
share.desc: Export a progress report to share with your teacher. The file contains your practice history and note tendencies.
settings.reset_desc: Delete all sessions, settings, and start fresh
settings.reset_confirm: Are you sure? This cannot be undone.
rhythm.mode_help.metronome: Set pulse and sound first. Then Start runs the metronome as a tool.
rhythm.mode_help.patterns: Choose difficulty and pattern first. You start the actual exercise inside the pattern area with a count-in and scoring.
rhythm.mode_help.subdivision: Set subdivision, time signature, and bars first. Then start the actual exercise inside the subdivision area.
rhythm.mode_goal.metronome: Goal: use the pulse as support. Speak, clap, or play with it, but this mode does not score you.
rhythm.mode_goal.patterns: Goal: internalize one clear rhythm pattern and perform it after the count-in in short, manageable rounds.
rhythm.mode_goal.subdivision: Goal: hear the main beats and fill the spaces between them evenly with eighths, triplets, or sixteenths.
rhythm.mode_goal.dictation: Goal: this mode is not active yet.
rhythm.sub_trainer.title: Subdivision Trainer
rhythm.sub_trainer.hint: You only hear the main beats. Speak or clap the subdivisions first, then play them evenly in between.
session.play_imported: Play each note and hold steady
assignment.title: Assignments
assignment.empty: No assignments. Import a file from your teacher.
assignment.notes_hint: Space-separated, e.g. Bb3 C4 D4 Eb4 F4
import.title: Imported Pieces
import.empty: No imported pieces. Import a MusicXML file to practice.
import.no_notes: No playable notes found in this file.
import.parse_error: Could not parse this file. Make sure it's valid MusicXML.
suggestion.weak_spots: {notes} need attention. Today we'll focus on those.
suggestion.streak_variety: {days} day streak -- let's add some variety!
suggestion.high_accuracy: {pct}% accuracy lately -- time for a challenge.
suggestion.back_to_basics: Focus on basics to stabilize intonation.
suggestion.balanced: Balanced session with long tones and scale.
suggestion.standard: Today as usual: warm-up and scale.
ob.headline: ToneTrainer
ob.subtitle: Your practice companion for wind instruments.
ob.instrument.title: What do you play?
ob.instrument.subtitle: We'll tailor exercises to your instrument.
ob.experience.title: How long have you been playing?
ob.experience.subtitle: This helps us adjust the difficulty.
ob.goals.title: How do you want to practice?
ob.goals.subtitle: Set your personal goal.
ob.mic.title: Let's hear you!
ob.mic.text: ToneTrainer needs microphone access to analyze your intonation.
ob.mic.denied: Microphone access was denied. Please enable it in system settings.
ob.mic.play_note: Hold a steady note for a brief moment.
ob.mic.status_no_signal: We are not hearing an input signal yet. Play, hum, or speak briefly into the microphone.
ob.mic.status_signal: Signal detected. For note display, the app now needs a steadier tone.
ob.mic.status_pitch: A pitch is being detected. Hold it a moment longer so the first session starts from a clean setup.
ob.mic.status_ready: Stable pitch detected. You are ready to start the first session.
ob.mic.clipping: The signal is very strong. Move a little farther from the microphone or play more softly.
ob.mic.success: Stable pitch detected. Everything is ready.
